title: OpsRole
description: Permission profile that scopes an agent's tool access, blast radius ceiling, audit requirements, and access restrictions within an operational workflow.

apiVersion.description: API version for the ops framework.

spec.description: Role specification defining tool permissions, blast radius ceiling, gate requirements, audit level, and optional access restrictions.

description.description: Human-readable description of the role's purpose and intended use.

tools.description: Tool permission lists for agents operating under this role.

allow.description: Tools that agents in this role are permitted to use.

deny.description: Tools that agents in this role are explicitly prohibited from using.

blast_radius_ceiling.description: Maximum blast radius classification of actions this role may perform. Agents cannot execute steps whose blast_radius exceeds this ceiling.

gates.description: Gate approval requirements for this role.

required_for.description: Blast radius values at which this role requires an OpsGate approval before proceeding.

audit.description: Audit trail configuration for agents operating under this role.

level.description: Detail level of audit trail entries emitted by this role. verbose: all tool calls and outputs; standard: state-changing actions; minimal: gate decisions and terminal outcomes only.

restrictions.description: Additional access restrictions layered on top of tool permissions.

read_only.description: When true, the agent may not write or modify any file, even if Write or Edit appear in tools.allow.

no_mutations.description: When true, the agent may not perform any state-mutating operation (file writes, service restarts, API calls with side effects).

allowed_paths.description: Filesystem path prefixes the agent is permitted to read. Access outside these paths is denied.

labels.description: Key-value labels for filtering and selection.
